section_miscategorizations.text: CMP and CBC were essentially unremarkable.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Laboratory results are objective data and fit better under Findings than in the symptom/history narrative.

section_miscategorizations.text: Blood pressure readings at home range from 130-150/95-100 in the morning and 130-145/70-80 in the evening.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Home blood pressure logs are patient-reported history data rather than in-clinic exam or test findings, so they more naturally belong in the HPI.
